title: State-machine validation on enum-field transitions
description: AJV draft-07 validates current-value membership on enum fields but cannot express allowed transitions. Every block schema today permits any enum value on any write. 'Issue status can only go from open to in-progress, not back to open' is not expressible. 'Finding decided-state transitions require user authority' is not expressible.

evidence.reference: status enum has open | resolved | deferred but no transitions constraint — any value can overwrite any other on updateItemInBlock
AJV draft-07 wrapper with no custom keywords; no before-value inspection at write time
updateItemInBlock does not pass the prior value to validation, so transition rules cannot be applied even if expressible

impact: The whole class of lifecycle-gated workflows (design review clean-gate, decision enacted gate, feature approval gate) cannot be enforced by schema. Current workaround is discipline. Discipline fails silently when agents run unattended.
canonical_vocabulary: state-machine validation; lifecycle invariant; transition guard
proposed_resolution: Add a custom AJV keyword (x-lifecycle) that the schema-validator reads. block-api.ts passes both prior-value and new-value to the validator at update time. Validator checks allowed transitions and required-authority. Fails write if transition is invalid or authority is insufficient.
